description.short: Chat with a LangGraph Fabric Agent through the hosted M365 Agents SDK adapter.
description.full: LangGraph Fabric Data Agent is a hosted bot-based Microsoft 365 agent that routes chat prompts through the M365 Agents SDK adapter to a LangGraph Fabric Data Agent over MCP. Replace the placeholder app ID, domains, and URLs with your deployed values before uploading this package to the Microsoft 365 admin center.

commands.title: Example 1
commands.description: Query the fabric data agent and tell me about who my top 5 customers are by sales
